description: Plugin-distributed hooks for localization-i18n. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable i18n anti-patterns (string concatenation around an interpolated value, n === 1 2-form plural logic, physical CSS in a file that ships RTL, hand-rolled date formatting, a catalog with no fallback). Set I18N_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
